mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( user_key, source_table, source_id, category, title, content, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userKey}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT n.notification_id, n.source_table, n.source_id, n.category, n.title, n.content, n.is_read, n.created_at, CASE n.source_table WHEN 'GROUP_JOIN_REQUEST' THEN gjr.group_id WHEN 'SCHEDULE' THEN gs.group_id ELSE NULL END AS group_id FROM notification n LEFT JOIN group_join_request gjr ON n.source_table = 'GROUP_JOIN_REQUEST' AND gjr.request_id = n.source_id LEFT JOIN group_schedule gs ON n.source_table = 'SCHEDULE' AND gs.schedule_id = n.source_id WHERE n.user_key = #{userKey} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_key = #{userKey} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_key = #{userKey}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_key = #{userKey} AND is_read = 0
